## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (`ruff check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes (`mypy src/flagforge`)
- [ ] `make test` passes (`pytest -q`)
- [ ] `make security` passes (`bandit -r src/flagforge`)
- [ ] New code has tests (coverage must stay ≥ 80 %)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
